title: desert blocks and items
body:
the mod adds block and items and structures related to the desert
this mod adds lots of sand blocks and a new ore called relium (shown below)
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58c5587d7c139d9e2dd5098fc454d56445dec4e0_0.webp)
it also adds a varies of items(below)
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d09e675f27a219d5b4cb8afcee695f7c70eb106_0.webp)
and finally it adds a biome called desert mainland, which has 4 different structures.(below)
![desert mainland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaaffceaadee0cbb58338d6d4a94f230015e5f90_0.webp)
